channel.title: 编程 on Entropy Decrease
channel.description: Recent content in 编程 on Entropy Decrease

item.title: install perl environment on Mac
item.description: install perlbrew 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 # override the default installation directory ($HOME/perl5) in .zshrc export PERLBREW_ROOT=$HOME/.local/perl5 export PERLBREW_CPAN_MIRROR=http://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/CPAN/ > curl -L http://xrl.us/perlbrewinstall | bash > echo "source ~/.local/perl5/perlbrew/etc/bashrc" >> ~/.zshrc install perl and cpanm 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 > perlbrew available > perlbrew install stable > perlbrew list > perlbrew switch perl-5.22.1 > perlbrew install install-cpanm > alias cpanm='cpanm --from http://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/CPAN/ ' install
